name: conservation-switching
title: Conservation Insight — Year-over-Year Practice Switching
subtitle: how the practice mix shifts from year to year, and which practices are gaining or losing ground
description: A conservation-insight showcase focused on practice switching over time — a stacked-area view of the practice mix by year, a ranking of practices by adoption share showing who rose and who fell, a before/after slope comparing each practice's share in 2015 vs 2025, and the overall share of acres that moved to a different practice since the baseline year.

dataAccesses.name: SwitchingKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(net_shift_pct),1) AS net_shift_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT practice) AS practice_count, COUNT(DISTINCT year) AS years_tracked_count, ROUND(MAX(gain_pct),1) AS biggest_gain_pct FROM v_practice_mix_by_year

dataAccesses.name: PracticeMixByYear
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, ROUND(AVG(covercrop_pct),1) AS covercrop_pct, ROUND(AVG(notill_pct),1) AS notill_pct, ROUND(AVG(reducedtill_pct),1) AS reducedtill_pct, ROUND(AVG(conventional_pct),1) AS conventional_pct FROM v_practice_mix_by_year WHERE crop LIKE ${crop} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CropOptions
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT crop FROM v_practice_mix_by_year ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: PracticeShift2015to2025
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, ROUND(AVG(pct_2015),1) AS pct_2015, ROUND(AVG(pct_2025),1) AS pct_2025 FROM v_practice_shift WHERE crop LIKE ${crop} GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AcresSwitchedSharePct
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(acres_switched) / SUM(acres_total),1) AS switched_share_pct FROM v_practice_switch_acres

kpis.label: Net Shift to Conservation Practices
kpis.info: Net percentage-point move toward cover crops and reduced tillage, away from conventional, since the baseline year.

kpis.label: Practices Tracked
kpis.info: Distinct tillage/cover practices followed across the time series.

kpis.label: Years Tracked
kpis.info: Distinct years represented in the practice-mix series.

kpis.label: Largest Single-Year Gain
kpis.info: The single biggest year-over-year gain posted by any one practice.

panels.title: Practice Mix by Year
panels.sub: responds to the Crop filter above
panels.info: Share of acres in each practice, year over year — the widening/narrowing bands show the mix shifting.

panels.title: Practice Ranking by Adoption Share
panels.info: Each practice's rank by adoption share, year over year — crossing lines show a practice overtaking another.

panels.title: Adoption Shift: 2015 vs 2025
panels.sub: responds to the Crop filter above
panels.info: Each practice's share of acres in 2015 vs 2025 — the steeper the line, the bigger the swing.

panels.title: Acres That Switched Practices
panels.info: Share of tracked acres that moved to a different practice at least once since the baseline year.
